feat.name: Poultice Preparation
feat.text: When you create an elixir as an herbal item, you can prepare it as a poultice instead. A poultice gains the oil trait (but remains alchemical, not magical) and loses the elixir trait. You can apply a poultice by Interacting with one hand. When you apply a poultice, in addition to the item’s normal effects, the recipient can attempt an immediate flat check to recover from a single source of persistent acid, bleed, or fire damage, with the DC reduction from appropriate assistance.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
